title: Finance MSc Programme Overview and Accreditation
text: Finance MSc: Award MSc, Duration 1 year, Course Type Full Time, Start Date 24 August 2026. Choosing this programme: Develop skills sought by employers in rapidly changing and complex financial environments, and advance your career in industry, government or research. On our Master of Finance in India, we will teach you advanced stock market analysis, corporate finance, and portfolio management. You will also study behavioural finance and explore the behavioural biases that can affect financial decision making in uncertain environments. The MSc is intended for those who aim to work in core finance jobs in the banking and financial industry. The programme follows the market and professional bodies closely and is mapped to skills that employers demand. It builds the ability to use and critically evaluate models and formal processes within finance and financial management. University of Southampton Business School is accredited to the Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business (AACSB) that signifies excellence in business education.
summary: The Finance MSc is a one-year full-time programme starting in August 2026, designed to equip students with advanced financial skills for careers in banking and finance, accredited by AACSB.
entities: Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business

title: Finance MSc Curriculum and Programme Structure
text: What you will study: This is a full-time 1-year degree programme. The first 9 months comprise taught study (2 semesters), followed by a 3-month individual research project for your dissertation. Topics covered include: complex financial products, assessing and managing financial risk, management decisions and value creation, econometric modelling, forecasting, and leading econometric and statistical software. Programme structure: Core finance modules such as quantitative finance, asset pricing, and portfolio management provide solid fundamentals for investment decisions and financial asset valuation. Optional modules in semester 2 allow specialisation in areas like computational finance, derivative securities analysis, and fixed income securities analysis. The Programme Description Document details aims, modules, and assessment. As a research-led University, continuous review ensures quality; programmes may be revised, but educational service expectations will be met. Refer to our Disclaimer for revision details.
summary: The 1-year Finance MSc includes 9 months of taught modules covering financial products, risk management, and econometric modeling, culminating in a 3-month dissertation research project.

title: Key Information for Finance MSc at UoSD
text: Key information: The University Grants Commission (UGC) mandates that the Finance MSc programme delivers equivalent quality to UK offerings. This one-year MSc Finance degree aligns with UK awarded degrees. Programmes are taught in English, with content equivalent to the University of Southampton's UK MSc Finance degree. Term dates are available from University of Southampton Delhi and are subject to change.
summary: The Finance MSc program, mandated by UGC, offers UK-equivalent quality and is taught in English over one year, matching University of Southampton's UK degree.

title: Finance MSc Career Prospects and Employability Support
text: Your future career: The University is a top 20 UK university for employability (QS Graduate Employability Rankings 2022), offering extensive support for the financial landscape. Students gain industry experience through trade simulation workshops, industry software, live company data, and weekly research seminars. Career opportunities span banking, finance, accountancy, business consultancy, and the public sector, with roles such as financial analyst, business analyst, and investment analyst. Careers services at University of Southampton Delhi include the Southampton skills model, online resources, workshops, personalised guidance via MyCareer, and e-mentoring. Links to multinational organizations and alumni events in India help students engage with employers and build networks, joining a global alumni community of over 220,000 across 180 countries.
summary: University of Southampton Delhi offers extensive career support for Finance MSc graduates, including industry experience, career services, and alumni networking, leading to roles in banking, finance, and consultancy.

title: Finance MSc Eligibility and English Language Requirements
text: Eligibility criteria for the Finance MSc programme require an upper second-class degree (2:1 or international equivalent) in a quantitative subject like finance, sciences, maths, engineering, computer science, economics, or quantitative business/management. Professional ACCA/ACA/CIMA/CA qualifications are considered case-by-case, and work experience can compensate for unrelated degrees. English language requirement: Accepted methods include an IELTS Test (6.5 overall, 6.0 in all components), other listed tests, or an approved academic qualification. A degree taught and assessed in English, completed within two years of enrolment at the University of Southampton, may also be accepted. Refer to the English Language proficiency guide for full details. Academic admissions criteria represent expected attainment but do not guarantee an offer.
summary: Applicants for the Finance MSc need a 2:1 degree in a quantitative field or professional qualifications like ACCA/ACA/CIMA/CA. English proficiency is required, typically an IELTS score of 6.5 overall, or an English-taught degree.

title: Finance MSc Tuition Fees and Payment Structure
text: Our fees: For Indian students starting August 2026, the Finance MSc tuition fee is 23,10,000 INR, paid in 4 instalments. A 10% deposit (2,31,000 INR) confirms the offer. Remaining payments are 5,54,400 INR by Sep 7, 2026; 7,62,300 INR by Jan 25, 2027; and 7,62,300 INR by Apr 19, 2027. For international students, the fee is 25,41,000 INR, with a 10% deposit (2,54,100 INR). Subsequent payments are 6,09,840 INR by Sep 7, 2026; 8,38,530 INR by Jan 25, 2027; and 8,38,530 INR by Apr 19, 2027. Fees may be adjusted for inflation, and future payment dates will align with the academic calendar.
summary: Finance MSc tuition fees for August 2026 are 23,10,000 INR for Indian students and 25,41,000 INR for international students, both payable in 4 instalments with a 10% deposit.

title: Scholarships and Finance MSc Application Process
text: Scholarships: Competitive scholarships are available for talented students. Our application process: Registration is open for the August 2026 academic year at the Delhi NCR campus. Prospective students can find guidance on university admissions pages and register to start their application. How to apply: Programmes are taught in English, with content equivalent to other University of Southampton students. Postgraduate programmes are one year long, aligning with UK awarded degrees. Students can receive a Conditional Offer based on predicted scores by applying early; final grades will be accepted once available.
summary: The application process for the August 2026 Finance MSc at Delhi NCR is open, offering conditional offers based on predicted scores for postgraduate students. Competitive scholarships are also available.
